function.message: Processed the next inbox item by running the six requested finance records through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to all listed invoice and purchase files while preserving each original body, then deleted the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in touched lanes, used OCR + migration workflows and finance schema, preserved original note bodies under new frontmatter, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request listed six specific finance files to run through OCR workflow. Each file was read, had complete visible data for required schema fields and line items, and was rewritten with the corresponding invoice/bill frontmatter while retaining the original body text verbatim below frontmatter. After all six were updated, the processed inbox file was deleted as required by inbox workflow.
